restaurant.name: SESAMIE
restaurant.subtitle: Asia Kitchen & Sushi
notes: Prices in the source use comma decimal format, e.g. 6,50.
Some dishes are marked in the PDF with icons for vegan, mildly spicy, gluten-free and/or recommended; icon extraction may be approximate where source text is ambiguous.
Allergens/additives are transcribed from the menu symbols and visible text.

items.name: House Wine Grauburgunder
items.description: Württemberg, Germany. Fresh, fruity, dry, and well-balanced.

items.name: Riesling
items.description: A. Dieh, Pfalz, Germany. A crisp, fresh, minerally, dry wine.

items.name: Sauvignon Blanc
items.description: La Forchetière Touraine, France. A fresh, citrusy, aromatic, dry wine.

items.name: Merlot
items.description: de Gras, Chile. A fruity, smooth, full-bodied dry wine.

items.name: Bordeaux
items.description: Château Loyasson Rouge, France. Elegant, fruity, robust, and harmonious.

items.name: Rosé
items.description: Domaine de Pellehaut, France. Strawberry- and raspberry-forward, fresh, and dry.

items.name: Prosecco Albinon Frizzante DOP
items.description: Albinon, Frizzante DOP, Italy. Fresh, lively, fruity, light-bodied, and dry.

items.name: Sesamie Stone Bowl
items.description: Hot stone bowl with shimeji mushrooms, shiitake, asparagus, sugar snap peas and fresh vegetables in red SESAMIE sauce, served with rice. Choice of protein.

items.name: Ocean Grill Plate
items.description: Grilled Black Tiger prawns and salmon with salat, pak choi, asparagus, shiitake and shimeji mushrooms and seasonal vegetables in a red SESAMIE sauce, served with rice

items.name: Crispy Duck Pot
items.description: Crispy duck in a clay pot with sautéed mushrooms and seasonal fresh vegetables, served with dark SESAMIE-sauce and sweet potato fries

items.name: Udon Surf & Turf
items.description: Tender grilled rib-eye steak (medium) and grilled king prawns with fresh vegetables and stir-fried udon noodles

items.name: Shaking Beef
items.description: Pan-seared entrecôte on a cast-iron skillet with onions, bell peppers, asparagus and green beans in green pepper sauce, served with rice

items.name: Sesamie Vegan Plate
items.description: Crispy vegan “chicken” in rice flake crust and crispy vegan “duck” with seasonal vegetables, asparagus, shiitake and shimeji mushrooms, pak choi, dark vegan SESAMIE-sauce and rice

items.name: Sesamie Vegan Bowl
items.description: Crispy tofu and fried vegan “chicken” with salad, avocado, cucumber, edamame, cherry tomatoes, bell pepper and carrots in sesame sauce, served with rice
